content:
To: All Employees
From: Security Department
Date: April 15, 2026
Subject: Updated Office Security Procedures

Due to recent security incidents in the building, all staff must now scan their employee ID cards upon entering and exiting the main lobby. Visitors will no longer be allowed without prior approval from their host. Additionally, employees are reminded to lock their computers when leaving their desks and to report any suspicious activity immediately to the security desk. These measures aim to enhance the safety of our workplace and protect company assets. Thank you for your cooperation in maintaining a secure environment.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?

options.B: To inform staff about new security rules
options.C: To invite employees to a meeting

questions.explanation: Mục đích chính của memo là thông báo về các quy trình an ninh mới (updated office security procedures) để tăng cường an toàn cho nơi làm việc.

questions.question: According to the memo, what must visitors do?

options.B: Obtain prior approval from their host
options.D: Leave their belongings at the entrance

questions.explanation: Thông tin trực tiếp: "Visitors will no longer be allowed without prior approval from their host." Đây là câu hỏi chi tiết dễ tìm.

questions.question: What should employees do when leaving their desks?
questions.explanation: Câu trả lời nằm rõ ràng ở phần "employees are reminded to lock their computers when leaving their desks".

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT mentioned as a new security measure?

options.C: Installing new cameras in all rooms

questions.explanation: Memo không đề cập đến việc lắp camera mới. Đây là dạng câu hỏi "NOT mentioned" yêu cầu loại trừ thông tin không có.

content:
From: HR Department <hr@techinnovate.vn>
To: All Department Managers
Subject: Urgent Recruitment for Software Engineer Positions

We are currently seeking three experienced Software Engineers for our expanding AI development team. Candidates should have at least three years of experience in Python and machine learning frameworks. The positions offer competitive salaries, health insurance, and opportunities for international training. Please encourage qualified staff members to refer suitable candidates or forward this email to your professional network. The deadline for applications is April 30, 2026. Detailed job descriptions are attached.

questions.question: Why did the HR Department send this email?

options.B: To request help in recruiting new engineers

questions.explanation: Email yêu cầu managers khuyến khích giới thiệu ứng viên (“encourage qualified staff members to refer suitable candidates”), đây là mục đích chính.

questions.question: What qualification is required for the positions?

options.B: At least three years in Python and machine learning

questions.explanation: Thông tin chi tiết: "Candidates should have at least three years of experience in Python and machine learning frameworks."

questions.question: What benefit is offered to new employees?
questions.explanation: Email nêu rõ lợi ích bao gồm "opportunities for international training".

questions.question: What can be inferred about the company?

options.B: Its AI development team is growing
options.C: It has stopped hiring new staff

questions.explanation: Cụm "our expanding AI development team" cho thấy đội ngũ đang mở rộng → suy luận gián tiếp.

content:
Summer Escape to Da Nang – Special Package Deal!

Discover the beauty of Da Nang with our exclusive 4-day 3-night package. Enjoy luxurious beachfront accommodation at a 5-star resort, daily buffet breakfast, and a complimentary half-day city tour. Book before May 15, 2026, and receive a free spa session worth 1,500,000 VND. This limited offer includes round-trip flights from Ho Chi Minh City and airport transfers. Perfect for couples and families seeking relaxation and adventure. Don’t miss this unforgettable summer getaway!

questions.question: What is being advertised?

options.B: A travel package to Da Nang

questions.explanation: Toàn bộ quảng cáo tập trung vào gói du lịch 4 ngày 3 đêm tại Đà Nẵng.

questions.question: What is included in the package?

options.B: Accommodation, breakfast, and a city tour

questions.explanation: Chi tiết rõ: "luxurious beachfront accommodation … daily buffet breakfast, and a complimentary half-day city tour."

questions.question: When does the special offer end?
questions.explanation: Thông tin trực tiếp: "Book before May 15, 2026".

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT included in the package?

options.C: A free spa session for all bookings

questions.explanation: Spa session miễn phí chỉ dành cho khách book trước ngày 15/5, không phải cho tất cả. Đây là dạng "NOT included".

content:
The Rise of Artificial Intelligence in Vietnamese Businesses

In recent years, Vietnamese companies have increasingly adopted artificial intelligence (AI) to improve operational efficiency. According to a recent survey by the Ministry of Information and Communications, over 65% of large enterprises now use AI tools for customer service and data analysis. While this technological shift creates new job opportunities in programming and data science, it also raises concerns about workforce displacement in routine tasks. Experts recommend that the government invest more in retraining programs to help workers adapt to the digital economy.

questions.question: What is the main topic of the article?

options.B: The increasing use of AI in Vietnamese companies

questions.explanation: Toàn bài tập trung vào việc áp dụng AI trong doanh nghiệp Việt Nam và các tác động liên quan.

questions.question: According to the survey, what percentage of large enterprises use AI?
questions.explanation: Thông tin trực tiếp: "over 65% of large enterprises now use AI tools".

questions.question: What concern is mentioned regarding AI adoption?
questions.explanation: Bài viết nêu rõ lo ngại về "workforce displacement in routine tasks".

questions.question: What does the article suggest the government should do?

options.A: Ban the use of AI immediately

questions.explanation: Câu cuối bài: "Experts recommend that the government invest more in retraining programs" – đây là suy luận từ khuyến nghị của chuyên gia.

content:
Dear Customer Relations Manager,

I am writing to express my disappointment with the delivery service of your company. I ordered a laptop on March 20, 2026, with guaranteed next-day delivery. However, the package arrived five days late and the box was damaged. Upon inspection, I discovered that the laptop screen had a visible crack. Despite my request for an immediate replacement, your representative only offered a partial refund. This experience has greatly affected my trust in your brand. I expect a full resolution within seven days.

Sincerely,
Nguyen Thi Lan

questions.question: What is the main purpose of this letter?

options.B: To complain about a damaged product and late delivery
options.C: To thank the company for excellent service

questions.explanation: Người viết bày tỏ sự thất vọng về giao hàng chậm và sản phẩm hỏng, đồng thời yêu cầu giải quyết.

questions.question: When was the laptop ordered?
questions.explanation: Thông tin rõ ràng: "I ordered a laptop on March 20, 2026".

questions.question: What problem did the writer discover with the laptop?

options.B: A visible crack on the screen

questions.explanation: Chi tiết: "the laptop screen had a visible crack".

questions.question: What can be inferred about the writer's attitude?

options.B: She has lost confidence in the company
options.C: She wants to order more products
options.D: She plans to visit the store

questions.explanation: Câu "This experience has greatly affected my trust in your brand" cho thấy sự mất lòng tin – suy luận từ giọng văn.

content:
To: All Department Heads
From: Executive Assistant
Date: April 17, 2026
Subject: Change in Quarterly Strategy Meeting Schedule

Please be informed that the quarterly strategy meeting originally scheduled for April 22 has been rescheduled to April 25, 2026, at 9:00 AM in Conference Room B. This change is due to the CEO’s unexpected business trip. All participants are requested to update their calendars and prepare the monthly performance reports as previously instructed. Refreshments will be provided. If you have any conflicts with the new date, please contact me before April 20.

questions.question: Why was the meeting rescheduled?

options.A: The conference room is under renovation
options.B: The CEO has an unexpected business trip
options.D: The company is celebrating a holiday

questions.explanation: Thông tin trực tiếp trong memo: "This change is due to the CEO’s unexpected business trip."

questions.question: When will the new meeting take place?
questions.explanation: Memo nêu rõ ngày mới là April 25, 2026.

questions.question: What should participants prepare?
questions.explanation: Yêu cầu rõ ràng: "prepare the monthly performance reports as previously instructed."

questions.question: What should department heads do if they cannot attend?
questions.explanation: Memo yêu cầu liên hệ trước ngày 20 tháng 4 nếu có xung đột lịch.

content:

To: Mr. Tran Van Minh <minh.tran@abccompany.com>

Dear Mr. Tran,

Thank you for your recent order. We are pleased to confirm that your order for 12 ergonomic office chairs and 5 filing cabinets has been processed. The items will be delivered to your office on April 28, 2026, between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM. A tracking number has been sent to your account. If you need to make any changes or have questions about the delivery, please reply to this email before April 25. We appreciate your continued trust in our products.

options.C: He works in the sales department

content:
Boost Your Career with Professional English Training!

Enroll now in our intensive Business English course at Horizon Language Center. This 8-week program focuses on presentation skills, email writing, negotiation, and meeting participation. Classes are held twice a week in the evening with native-speaking instructors. Early bird registration before May 10, 2026, receives a 25% discount and free business vocabulary e-book. Limited seats available. Suitable for professionals aiming for promotion or international projects. Visit our website or call 028-3824-5678 today!

questions.question: What is being advertised?
questions.explanation: Toàn bộ quảng cáo giới thiệu khóa học Business English.

questions.question: How long does the course last?
questions.explanation: Thông tin rõ: "This 8-week program".

questions.question: What benefit is offered for early registration?
questions.explanation: Early bird trước 10/5 nhận giảm 25% và sách điện tử miễn phí.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT mentioned as a course focus?
questions.explanation: Quảng cáo không đề cập đến ngữ pháp nâng cao.

content:
Remote Work Continues to Reshape Vietnam’s Labor Market

After the pandemic, many Vietnamese companies have adopted hybrid working models permanently. A recent study by the Vietnam Chamber of Commerce and Industry reveals that 58% of white-collar workers prefer working from home at least three days a week. While this flexibility increases employee satisfaction and reduces commuting costs, it also presents challenges in team collaboration and company culture maintenance. HR managers suggest regular virtual team-building activities and clear performance metrics to ensure productivity remains high in the new working environment.

questions.question: What is the main idea of the article?

options.A: Traditional office work is more effective
options.B: Hybrid and remote work are becoming common in Vietnam
options.C: Companies are returning to full-time office work

questions.explanation: Bài báo thảo luận về xu hướng làm việc từ xa/hybrid và tác động của nó.

questions.question: According to the study, what percentage of white-collar workers prefer hybrid work?
questions.explanation: Số liệu trực tiếp: "58% of white-collar workers prefer..."

questions.question: What challenge of remote work is mentioned?

options.B: Difficulties in team collaboration and culture

questions.explanation: Bài viết nêu rõ thách thức về "team collaboration and company culture maintenance".

questions.question: What solution do HR managers recommend?

options.B: Organize virtual team-building and set clear metrics
options.D: Require all staff to work overtime

questions.explanation: Khuyến nghị của HR: "regular virtual team-building activities and clear performance metrics".

content:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to follow up on my application for the Marketing Specialist position (Ref: MK-2304) that I submitted on March 28, 2026. I remain very enthusiastic about the opportunity to contribute to your dynamic marketing team at Green Solutions. With my five years of experience in digital campaign management and proven track record of increasing brand engagement by 40%, I believe I would be a strong addition to your company. I would greatly appreciate any update regarding the status of my application. Thank you once again for considering my candidacy.

Best regards,
Le Thi Kim Anh

questions.question: What is the purpose of this letter?

options.B: To follow up on a job application

questions.explanation: Người viết theo dõi hồ sơ xin việc đã nộp.

questions.question: When did the writer submit the application?
questions.explanation: Thông tin rõ ràng: "submitted on March 28, 2026".

questions.question: What achievement does the writer mention?
questions.explanation: Thành tích được nêu: "increasing brand engagement by 40%".

questions.question: What can be inferred about the writer’s attitude?

options.A: She is no longer interested in the position
options.B: She is still highly motivated and eager
options.C: She has already accepted another offer
options.D: She is dissatisfied with the recruitment process

questions.explanation: Cụm "I remain very enthusiastic" cho thấy sự nhiệt tình vẫn cao.

content:
To: All Employees
From: Facilities Management
Date: April 18, 2026
Subject: Scheduled Elevator Maintenance

The elevators in Building A will undergo routine maintenance from 6:00 PM on April 22 to 6:00 AM on April 23, 2026. During this period, only the emergency stairs will be available. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. Employees working late are advised to plan accordingly. The maintenance team will work efficiently to minimize disruption. Normal elevator service will resume on the morning of April 23. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?

options.B: To inform staff about elevator maintenance

questions.explanation: Memo thông báo lịch bảo trì thang máy.

questions.question: When will the maintenance take place?

options.B: From 6:00 PM April 22 to 6:00 AM April 23

questions.explanation: Thời gian bảo trì được ghi rõ ràng.

questions.question: What should employees use during the maintenance period?
questions.explanation: Chỉ có cầu thang thoát hiểm khả dụng.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT true according to the memo?

options.B: Elevators will be fully operational on April 23 morning
options.C: Employees do not need to make any changes to their plans
options.D: The company apologizes for the inconvenience

questions.explanation: Memo khuyên nhân viên làm việc muộn nên lập kế hoạch (plan accordingly), nên câu C không đúng.

content:
Open a Premium Savings Account Today and Enjoy Exclusive Benefits!

ABC Bank is offering a special promotion for new Premium Savings Account holders. Deposit VND 500 million or more and receive an attractive interest rate of 7.2% per annum for the first 12 months. In addition, you will enjoy free unlimited domestic transfers, priority customer service, and complimentary travel insurance when booking flights through our partner. This limited-time offer ends on May 31, 2026. Visit any ABC Bank branch or apply online to secure your financial future with peace of mind.

questions.question: What is the minimum deposit required for the promotion?
questions.explanation: Thông tin trực tiếp: "Deposit VND 500 million or more".

questions.question: What interest rate is offered for the first year?
questions.explanation: Lãi suất là 7.2% mỗi năm trong 12 tháng đầu.

questions.question: Which benefit is included with the account?
questions.explanation: Quà tặng bao gồm bảo hiểm du lịch miễn phí.

questions.question: What can be inferred about this promotion?

options.A: It is available all year round
options.B: It targets customers with substantial savings
options.D: The interest rate is fixed for 5 years

questions.explanation: Số tiền gửi tối thiểu cao (500 triệu) cho thấy dành cho khách hàng có vốn lớn.

content:
Vietnam’s Tourism Industry Embraces Sustainability

With over 18 million international visitors last year, Vietnam is actively promoting eco-friendly tourism practices. Many hotels and tour operators have adopted green initiatives such as reducing single-use plastics, using solar energy, and supporting local communities. However, experts warn that rapid development without proper planning could harm fragile ecosystems in popular destinations like Ha Long Bay and Phu Quoc. The government has recently launched a national campaign encouraging both businesses and tourists to practice responsible travel to preserve Vietnam’s natural beauty for future generations.

questions.question: What is the main topic of the article?

options.A: Decline in tourist numbers in Vietnam
options.B: Efforts to develop sustainable tourism in Vietnam
options.C: New visa policies for foreign visitors

questions.explanation: Bài báo tập trung vào việc thúc đẩy du lịch bền vững.

questions.question: Approximately how many international visitors did Vietnam welcome last year?
questions.explanation: Số liệu: "over 18 million international visitors last year".

questions.question: What warning do experts give?

options.A: Tourism will decrease sharply next year
options.D: Local communities do not support tourism

questions.explanation: Chuyên gia cảnh báo về tác hại đến hệ sinh thái mong manh.

questions.question: What has the government launched?

options.A: A campaign to ban international tourism
options.B: A national campaign for responsible travel

questions.explanation: Chính phủ khởi xướng chiến dịch khuyến khích du lịch có trách nhiệm.

content:
From: Customer Service <support@techgear.vn>
To: Ms. Pham Thi Hoa
Subject: Thank You for Your Recent Feedback

Dear Ms. Pham,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with our wireless headphones purchased last month. We are sorry to hear that the battery life did not meet your expectations. Our technical team has noted your feedback and is currently working on improving the product’s performance in the next version. As a token of appreciation, we would like to offer you a 30% discount voucher for your next purchase. Please use code THANKYOU30 at checkout. We value your opinion and strive to provide better service.

questions.question: Why did the company send this email?

options.B: To respond to customer feedback about headphones
options.C: To announce a new product launch

questions.explanation: Email cảm ơn phản hồi và giải quyết vấn đề về thời lượng pin.

questions.question: What problem did the customer mention?
questions.explanation: Vấn đề được đề cập là thời lượng pin không như mong đợi.

questions.question: What compensation is offered to the customer?
questions.explanation: Công ty tặng voucher giảm 30% cho lần mua sau.

questions.question: What can be inferred about the company’s attitude?

options.B: They take feedback seriously and try to improve

questions.explanation: Công ty ghi nhận phản hồi, đang cải tiến sản phẩm và tặng quà tri ân.

content:
Dear Valued Partner,

We are delighted to invite you and your team to our Annual Corporate Social Responsibility Gala Dinner on May 15, 2026, at 6:30 PM at the Grand Palace Hotel, Ho Chi Minh City. This year’s event will honor outstanding contributions to environmental protection projects in the Mekong Delta region. Your presence would mean a great deal to us as we continue building strong partnerships for sustainable development. Please confirm your attendance by May 5, 2026. We look forward to celebrating meaningful achievements together.

Sincerely,
Nguyen Hoang Vu
CEO, EcoFuture Corporation

options.A: To complain about a delayed project
options.B: To invite partners to a CSR gala dinner

options.B: Contributions to environmental projects in Mekong Delta

questions.explanation: Sự kiện tôn vinh đóng góp cho các dự án bảo vệ môi trường.

questions.question: By when should the recipient reply?
questions.explanation: Hạn xác nhận tham dự là trước ngày 5 tháng 5 năm 2026.

content:
To: All Employees
From: Human Resources Department
Date: April 18, 2026
Subject: Update on Annual Leave Policy

Effective from May 1, 2026, the company will increase annual leave entitlement from 12 days to 15 days per year for all full-time employees. This change aims to improve work-life balance and employee well-being. Please note that unused leave can now be carried forward to the following year up to a maximum of 10 days. Employees are encouraged to plan their vacations in advance and submit leave requests at least two weeks prior to the intended date. The updated policy document is attached for your reference.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?

options.B: To inform staff about changes in annual leave policy
options.C: To introduce new dress code rules

questions.explanation: Memo thông báo rõ ràng việc tăng ngày nghỉ phép hàng năm từ 12 lên 15 ngày.

questions.question: How many annual leave days will employees receive after May 1?
questions.explanation: Thông tin trực tiếp: tăng từ 12 ngày lên 15 ngày.

questions.question: What is the new maximum number of carry-forward leave days?
questions.explanation: Memo nêu rõ "up to a maximum of 10 days".

questions.question: What should employees do before taking leave?

options.B: Submit requests at least two weeks in advance
options.C: Wait for manager approval without notice
options.D: Pay a fee for each leave day

questions.explanation: Yêu cầu nộp đơn xin nghỉ trước ít nhất hai tuần.

content:
Vietnam’s Electric Vehicle Market Shows Strong Growth Potential

The demand for electric vehicles (EVs) in Vietnam has grown rapidly over the past two years. According to industry reports, EV sales increased by 85% in 2025 compared to the previous year. Major manufacturers are expanding their production lines while the government offers tax incentives to encourage green transportation. However, challenges remain, including limited charging infrastructure and high battery replacement costs. Experts predict that with continued investment and policy support, EVs could account for 30% of new vehicle sales by 2030.

questions.question: What is the main topic of the article?

options.B: Rapid growth of the electric vehicle market in Vietnam

questions.explanation: Bài báo tập trung vào sự phát triển mạnh mẽ của thị trường xe điện tại Việt Nam.

questions.question: By what percentage did EV sales increase in 2025?
questions.explanation: Số liệu trực tiếp: tăng 85% so với năm trước.

questions.question: What challenge is mentioned regarding EVs?
questions.explanation: Thách thức được nêu là hạ tầng sạc còn hạn chế.

questions.question: What do experts predict for 2030?

options.A: EVs will disappear from the market
options.B: EVs may reach 30% of new vehicle sales
options.D: No government support will be given

questions.explanation: Dự báo của chuyên gia: xe điện có thể chiếm 30% doanh số xe mới vào năm 2030.

content:
Dear Accounts Payable Manager,

I am writing regarding overdue payments for three invoices (INV-3921, INV-3924, and INV-3930) that were due on March 15, 2026. Despite several reminders, we have not yet received the outstanding amount of VND 285,000,000. This delay has seriously affected our cash flow and ability to fulfill other orders. We value our long-term business relationship and hope this matter can be resolved promptly. Please arrange payment within the next seven business days. We look forward to your immediate attention to this issue.

Sincerely,
Pham Quang Huy
Procurement Manager, Viet Supplies Co.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of this letter?
questions.explanation: Thư khiếu nại về việc thanh toán chậm trễ các hóa đơn.

questions.question: How much money is still outstanding?
questions.explanation: Số tiền còn nợ là VND 285,000,000.

questions.question: When were the invoices originally due?
questions.explanation: Hạn thanh toán ban đầu là ngày 15 tháng 3 năm 2026.

questions.question: What can be inferred about the relationship between the two companies?

options.B: They have had a long-term business relationship
options.C: They have never worked together before

questions.explanation: Cụm "We value our long-term business relationship" cho thấy quan hệ hợp tác lâu dài.

content:
To: All Staff
From: Safety Committee
Date: April 20, 2026
Subject: Monthly Fire Safety Drill

A fire safety drill will be conducted on Thursday, April 24, 2026, at 10:30 AM. All employees must participate and follow the instructions of the safety officers. When the alarm sounds, please leave the building calmly using the nearest emergency exit and gather at the designated assembly point in the courtyard. Do not use the elevators. This drill is essential to ensure everyone knows the correct evacuation procedures in case of a real emergency. Your cooperation is greatly appreciated.

questions.question: What is the purpose of this memo?

options.B: To inform staff about a fire safety drill

questions.explanation: Memo thông báo về buổi diễn tập phòng cháy chữa cháy.

questions.question: When will the fire drill take place?
questions.explanation: Ngày và giờ được nêu rõ: Thursday, April 24, 2026, at 10:30 AM.

questions.question: What should employees do when the alarm sounds?

options.B: Leave using the nearest emergency exit

questions.explanation: Hướng dẫn rõ ràng là sử dụng lối thoát hiểm gần nhất.

questions.question: Where should staff gather after evacuation?

options.B: At the designated assembly point in the courtyard

questions.explanation: Điểm tập trung là sân trước (courtyard).

content:
Master Business English from Anywhere with FlexLearn!

FlexLearn’s new online Business English course offers flexible scheduling and interactive lessons with certified native teachers. Improve your speaking, writing, and presentation skills through real-life business scenarios. The 12-week program includes weekly live classes, recorded sessions, and personalized feedback. Enroll before April 30, 2026, and get 40% off the regular fee plus free access to our business vocabulary library. Ideal for working professionals who want to advance their careers. Start your free trial today at www.flexlearn.edu.vn.

questions.question: What is being advertised?
questions.explanation: Quảng cáo giới thiệu khóa học tiếng Anh kinh doanh trực tuyến.

questions.question: How long is the program?
questions.explanation: Chương trình kéo dài 12 tuần.

questions.question: What discount is offered if enrolling before April 30?
questions.explanation: Giảm 40% phí học nếu đăng ký trước ngày 30 tháng 4.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT included in the course?
questions.explanation: Khóa học không đề cập đến sách in gửi qua bưu điện.

content:
Young Entrepreneurs Drive Innovation in Vietnam’s Startup Ecosystem

In the past five years, the number of startups founded by people under 30 in Vietnam has increased dramatically. These young founders bring fresh ideas in fintech, e-commerce, and green technology. While access to funding remains a major challenge, government initiatives and private incubators have provided valuable mentorship and seed capital. Success stories such as VNPay and Tiki have inspired a new generation. However, experts emphasize that sustainable growth requires not only innovative ideas but also strong business management skills and market understanding.

questions.question: What is the main idea of the article?

options.A: Traditional businesses are more successful than startups
options.B: Young people are playing a key role in Vietnam’s startup scene
options.C: The government has banned new startups

questions.explanation: Bài báo nhấn mạnh vai trò của giới trẻ trong hệ sinh thái khởi nghiệp.

questions.question: What fields are mentioned as areas of innovation?
questions.explanation: Các lĩnh vực được nêu là fintech, thương mại điện tử và công nghệ xanh.

questions.question: What remains a major challenge for young entrepreneurs?
questions.explanation: Thách thức lớn là tiếp cận vốn.

questions.question: What do experts say is necessary for sustainable growth?

options.B: Strong business management skills and market understanding
options.C: Large office spaces in city centers

questions.explanation: Chuyên gia nhấn mạnh cần kỹ năng quản lý và hiểu biết thị trường.

content:
From: Training & Development <training@globalcorp.vn>
To: All Staff
Subject: Registration Open for Leadership Development Program

Dear Colleagues,

We are pleased to announce that registration is now open for the 2026 Leadership Development Program. This six-month course is designed for high-potential employees who wish to enhance their management and strategic thinking skills. Sessions will be held every Saturday morning from May to October. Participants will receive certificates upon successful completion. Limited spots are available. Please submit your application through the internal portal by April 30, 2026. Don’t miss this opportunity to invest in your professional growth.

questions.question: What is the purpose of this email?

options.A: To invite staff to a company picnic
options.B: To announce a leadership training program
options.D: To request feedback on new software

questions.explanation: Email thông báo mở đăng ký chương trình phát triển lãnh đạo.

questions.question: How long does the program last?
questions.explanation: Chương trình kéo dài sáu tháng.

questions.question: When will the sessions be held?
questions.explanation: Buổi học diễn ra vào sáng thứ Bảy.

questions.question: By when must employees submit their applications?
questions.explanation: Hạn nộp đơn là trước ngày 30 tháng 4 năm 2026.

content:
Dear Ms. Nguyen Thi Lan,

Thank you very much for interviewing me yesterday for the Senior Accountant position at Bright Accounting Firm. I enjoyed our discussion about the company’s expansion plans and the challenges of implementing new financial software. The interview further strengthened my desire to contribute my seven years of experience in financial reporting and auditing to your respected team. I am confident that my skills and enthusiasm would make me a valuable asset. Please let me know if you need any additional information. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Sincerely,
Vo Minh Tuan

questions.question: What is the purpose of this letter?

options.B: To thank the interviewer and express continued interest
options.D: To complain about the interview process

questions.explanation: Đây là thư cảm ơn sau phỏng vấn và khẳng định mong muốn được làm việc.

questions.question: How many years of experience does the writer have?
questions.explanation: Người viết có bảy năm kinh nghiệm trong báo cáo tài chính và kiểm toán.

questions.question: What topic was discussed during the interview?

options.B: Expansion plans and new financial software

questions.explanation: Chủ đề thảo luận là kế hoạch mở rộng và thách thức triển khai phần mềm tài chính mới.

questions.question: What can be inferred about the writer’s feelings after the interview?

options.A: He is no longer interested in the position
options.B: He is even more motivated to join the company
options.C: He found the interview too difficult
options.D: He has accepted another job offer

questions.explanation: Cụm "further strengthened my desire" cho thấy sự nhiệt tình tăng lên sau buổi phỏng vấn.
